verbs.name: connect
verbs.description: Onboard project to vault — rigid 5-step init (breadcrumb, AGENTS.md+CLAUDE.md, vault scaffold, session note, .gitignore). Idempotent.

verbs.name: port
verbs.description: Migrate any legacy project (raw repo, obsidian-bridge legacy, hand-authored) to adjudant compliance. Two-phase: first run writes a preview, second run applies it. Idempotent.

verbs.name: sync
verbs.description: Push project state to vault — refresh brief, mirror handoff, refresh project index.

verbs.name: check
verbs.description: Read-only summary — project state, vault snapshot, schema compliance. Calls check.py for the scan, Claude renders. Never writes.

verbs.name: sitrep
verbs.description: ELI5 orientation briefing — where were we, what's done, where the vault is, and where best to start. Read-only; sitrep.py scans, Claude renders four plain-language lines. For re-orienting after a break; complements check (which reports schema compliance).

verbs.name: tidy
verbs.description: Surface mechanical sweep — rebuild _index.md, normalise tags per locked schema, fix wikilink form, bump updated:. Two-phase: tidy.py preview, then tidy.py apply. Idempotent. Daily/weekly cadence.

verbs.name: ramasse
verbs.description: Deep structural clean — folder shape, schema, file types, naming, renames, broken-wikilink triage, doc/decision mismatches. Used sparingly (quarterly). Analysis phase via ramasse_scan.py; planning + execute via superpowers.

verbs.name: dream
verbs.description: Content/knowledge/memory refresh — semantic, the third cleanup tier. Reads prose of decisions/notes/sessions and surfaces a 10-category comparator catalog (staleness, supersession, contradictions, redundancy, stale refs, orphan questions/threads, unacted decisions, documentation gaps, dangling scopes) for Claude to judge. Analysis via dream.py (read-only); judge + plan + execute via superpowers, with backups for destructive content ops. Fully standalone — no dependency on other plugins.

verbs.name: draw
verbs.description: Create visual artefacts — canvas, base, or mermaid diagram.

verbs.name: board
verbs.description: Scaffold a self-hosted work-order kanban board (drag-to-move, disk-persisted via the File System Access API) seeded from tasks/ — a standard surface any project can have. Target the current project, a named one (--project SLUG), or every project (--all). Refresh-without-clobber: re-seeding merges current tasks while preserving dragged columns (--force rebuilds). Generates board-data.json + a self-contained board.html. Helper: board.py (scaffold|serve).
